I made solid progress on the reading response while working from the library, confirming that relocating was the right decision to avoid the roommate's odor.

I successfully addressed the odor issue directly with Roommate_R, who apologized sincerely and promised to fix it immediately without any lasting friction.

I worked two hours on the reading response, improving progress to 0.89, but my energy is critically low at 0.0 with a sleep debt of two hours.
I made further progress on the reading response, but my energy is critically depleted with a two-hour sleep debt.
I advanced the reading response to 0.97, but with zero energy and two hours of sleep debt, I am physically unable to continue effectively.
I advanced the reading response to 0.98, but with zero energy and a two-hour sleep debt, I am physically incapable of working further.
The reading response is complete, but my zero energy and two-hour sleep debt mean I am physically unable to work further.
